ddls:
CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Survey ID to which the response belongs */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "response_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "educ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "educ" TEXT /* Education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race or ethnicity */,
  "race_eth" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race or ethnicity */,
  "ancestry" TEXT /* Specific ancestry or heritage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "partyid" TEXT /* Political party identification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  "party_ideology" TEXT /* Ideological leaning of the party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Population density of the region */,
  "economic_status" TEXT /* Economic status of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "turnout_class" TEXT /* Turnout class */,
  "turnout_scale" TEXT /* Turnout scale */,
  "turnout_score" TEXT /* Turnout score */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the turnout record */,
  "turnout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the turnout rate */,
  "turnout_trend" TEXT /* Trend in turnout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_methods" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact method */,
  "phone_type" TEXT /* Type of phone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contact method */,
  "contact_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of contact */,
  "contact_channel" TEXT /* Channel of contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight record */,
  "w_lv" TEXT /* Weight for likely voters */,
  "w_rv" TEXT /* Weight for registered voters */,
  "final_weight" TEXT /* Final weight for survey response */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight record */,
  "weight_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the weight */,
  "weight_source" TEXT /* Source of the weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "survey_author" TEXT /* Author of the survey */,
  "survey_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the survey */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method of conducting the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)
column_names: Survey ID to which the response belongs
Date when the response was recorded
Unique identifier for each education level
Unique identifier for each race or ethnicity
Description of the race or ethnicity
Unique identifier for each political party
Unique identifier for each turnout record
Unique identifier for each contact method
Unique identifier for each weight record
Date when the survey was conducted
